title.en: In the days that followed, Hamoro was confined ...

content.en:
In the days that followed, Hamoro was confined to one place to practice.

And Ye Tian also informed the other Ultimate Masters of the news of the awakening of an ancient demon, and the other Ultimate Masters were immediately shocked and panicked.

Doomsday Extreme Venerable and Shadow Sand Extreme Venerable were the first to come over to inquire about the situation.

"Ten Thousand Laws Extreme Venerable, what the hell is going on?"

Doomsday Supreme asked.

Ye Tian explained: "A peak ancient demon-level powerhouse has awakened, come to my territory, and has been subdued by me. For the time being, he won't do anything, I restricted his movements, but I didn't kill him, if I killed him, it would be easy to anger the ultimate ancient demon behind him. At the very least, we're not in conflict with these Ancients right now. "

"Hmm!"

They all nodded.

Those ancient demons can awaken, and if they are offended, they are no match at all.

Therefore, if you can not offend, you must not be offended.

In the days that followed, Ye Tian worked harder to cultivate, making his physical body stronger and stronger, and his cultivation higher and higher.

After another period of time, another peak ancient demon-level powerhouse woke up, and his strength was only a little stronger than Hamoro, and the other party learned of Ye Tian's strength, and he didn't dare to cause trouble.

And Ye Tian, with the help of the resources from the Fragmented Void of Time and Space, gradually improved his cultivation to the limit of the peak Ultimate Extreme Venerable.

If a period of time passed, he would be able to impact the Extreme Dao Ultimate Extreme Venerable Realm, and the realm would be equivalent to the Ultimate Ancient Demon.

For him, impacting the Extreme Dao Ultimate Extreme Venerable Realm was just a very simple matter, and there was no bottleneck.

And at this time, more and more ancient demons woke up, but fortunately, they were all peak ancient demon-level powerhouses, and some wanted to cause trouble, but they were directly suppressed by Ye Tian.

In the case that the other Ultimate Ancient Demons had not awakened, these peak Ancient Demon-level powerhouses did not dare to cause trouble at all.

In this way, Ye Tian's cultivation gradually improved to the extreme of the Peak Ultimate Extreme Venerable, and he could impact the Extreme Dao Ultimate Extreme Venerable.

......

Fragments of time and space.

A copy of Ye Tian's body came here, ready to use the violent space-time particle energy here to impact the Extreme Dao Ultimate Extreme Venerable.

"Let's get started!"

Ye Tian began to transform his Ultimate Extreme Extreme Body, turning into the Ultimate Extreme Extreme Body.

He had already comprehended the ultimate rules of the Ten Thousand Laws Extreme Dao, and his will had also been transformed into the Extreme Dao Ultimate Will, and breaking through was just a matter of thought.

Rumble!!!!

His body began to frantically absorb the energy of space-time particles, and no matter how violent the energy was, he absorbed it and turned it into nutrients for his body.

More and more energy was refined by Ye Tian, allowing his body to gradually transform successfully.

I don't know how long it has been, but the aura on Ye Tian's body has gradually stabilized.

"The Extreme Dao Ultimate Extreme Venerable Body is at least twenty times stronger!"

Ye Tian estimated.

Moreover, his Extreme Dao Ultimate Will was nearly ten times stronger, and this transformation was too great, making his strength far surpass that of the past.

"With my current strength, compared to those ultimate ancient demons, there shouldn't be many opponents for me!"

Ye Tian estimated.

Moreover, he has also mastered several space-time level Extreme Dao Ultimate Arcane, that is, the realm of the Flesh Body and the Ten Thousand Laws Extreme Dao Ultimate Rules is not high, otherwise his combat power is definitely comparable to that of the Dovigu Demon.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian replaced the other replica bodies with the Extreme Dao Ultimate Extreme Venerable Body, with his current strength, he was not afraid of those Ultimate Ancient Demons, which was enough to protect the human race.

When he reached the Extreme Dao Ultimate Extreme Body, it was more difficult for him to continue to improve his physical body cultivation, and he needed more resources.

Moreover, he had to continue to improve the ultimate rule of the Ten Thousand Laws Extreme Dao.

Fortunately, he still has the fragments of the space-time level Extreme Dao Ultimate Treasure, and by using the copy body to continuously analyze and deduce, he can comprehend the ultimate rules of the Ten Thousand Laws Extreme Dao of a higher realm.

Now, his Ten Thousand Laws Extreme Dao Ultimate Rule continues to improve.

And after he broke through to the Extreme Dao Ultimate Extreme Venerable Realm, it was easier to comprehend the ultimate rules of the Ten Thousand Laws Extreme Dao, and his efficiency was at least dozens of times higher.

......

this day.

In the place where the ancient demons were sleeping, a large number of peak ancient demon-level powerhouses woke up, and this situation alarmed a copy of Ye Tian's body that had been guarding here.

"A large number of peak ancient demon-level powerhouses have awakened!"

But fortunately, the Ultimate Ancient Demons have not yet awakened, and he has broken through to the Extreme Ultimate Extreme Venerable, and he can still suppress them.

After these ancient demon-level powerhouses woke up, they did not come out immediately, but regained their strength.

But not long after, one after another, peak ancient demon-level powerhouses came out one after another.

Ye Tian directly demonstrated the cultivation of the Extreme Dao Ultimate Extreme Venerable, so that these strong people did not dare to make trouble.

Then, not long after, an Ultimate Ancient Demon awakened.

......

"I've seen the great Lord Nome!"

A group of peak ancient demon-level powerhouses said respectfully.

The strength of this Nome Ancient Demon is not weak, and it is not an ordinary Ultimate Ancient Demon, and the ordinary Ultimate Ancient Demon has long since fallen in that battle.

And the strength of the Nome Ancient Demon is considered a relatively medium level among the Ultimate Ancient Demons, which is enough to crush most ordinary Ultimate Ancient Demons.

"'What is the situation in this day and age?'

Norm asked.

Immediately, a peak Ancient Demon-level powerhouse handed over a piece of information.

"Hey, is this era so weak? That's right, we have shattered the Endless Time and Space Domain, and also shattered the Endless Time and Space Line, the heavens and the earth have collapsed, the rules are chaotic, and we cannot give birth to a powerful race, and we cannot give birth to an existence comparable to us. "

"However, in this case, there is also an Extreme Dao Ultimate Extreme Venerable that is comparable to the Ultimate Ancient Demon, which is somewhat interesting. "[]

"Ten Thousand Law Extreme Venerable, he has just broken through to the Extreme Dao Ultimate Venerable, his strength should not be strong, and he is definitely not my opponent. This era belongs to the era of our ancient demon clan, and the creatures of this era will become our slaves!"

Nome Ancient Demon has not done it for too long, he is ready to use Ye Tian to practice his hands, let Ye Tian surrender to him, and then occupy the hole cards of this era, and then transform it into a territory suitable for the ancient demon clan to inhabit.

Immediately, the Norm Ancient Demon went out from here, taking a group of peak Ancient Demon level powerhouses to the Terran territory.

......

Outside the Land of the Ancient Devil's Slumber.

Ye Tian's duplicate body was no longer hidden, and directly intercepted the Norm Ancient Demon.

"What do you want to do?"

Ye Tian asked.

Nome Ancient Demon stared at Ye Tian and said with a smile: "It turns out that you are hiding here, I am the ultimate Ancient Demon Nome Ancient Demon, are you willing to take refuge in me?"

Ye Tian said coldly: "This era is not the era of ancient demons, since Your Excellency has awakened, you should stay honest." "

As soon as these words came out, the ancient demon of Nom was furious!
